$comment: c27 (D-CSUBSET-VOLATILE-POINTEE) — the volatile-pointee STRUCT MEMBER pin (the SQLite WAL `volatile u32 **apWiData` shape, scaled down). The member `p` is `volatile int *` = Ptr<VolatileQual(int)>; `*s.p` carries MirInstFlags::Volatile so the RELEASE optimizer keeps the volatile loads/store. main() re-reads `*s.p` after a re-assign and returns 42 (volatile => observes 7, not a cached 35). Renamed in place from the retired pointee-reject example `volatile_member_error`. No stdout (libc-free); exit code only. arm64-elf runs under qemu.
